---
pagetitle: "jstats — Reference"
title-prefix: ""
---

## Reference

::: {.callout-note title="Coming soon"}
This section will be a task- and function-indexed reference — a place to look up
how to do a specific thing while you work. It complements the package's built-in
help pages with friendlier, web-linkable entries.
:::

In the meantime, every jstats function has a built-in help page: type `?` followed
by the function name in the console (for example `?jfreq`).
